run_purpose: Prepare a future live Codex CLI DR mesh smoke run against the DRACO row-0 pointer without authorizing launch.

approval.reviewed_by: pending Principal or main coordinator review
approval.approval_note: Execution is closed. This draft may be used only by mesh-live-plan to render dry-run launch plans and prompt files.

runner.command_surface: alexandria-dr mesh-live-plan dry run; future live execution adapter pending Principal reopening
runner.approval_policy: never until named live receipt is approved

authority.scorer_manifest: blocked until a scorer bridge is approved

allowed_sources: public web sources discovered by a future approved run
sandbox/codex-dr docs, harness specs, and run manifests
forbidden_sources: paid benchmark corpora unless separately authorized
large raw benchmark files in git
inputs.data_policy: Raw DRACO payload may be fetched only into ignored tmp/run paths after a live receipt permits it. Do not commit raw/full benchmark data.

operational_bounds.external_monitoring: foreground coordinator supervision required for any future live run
operational_bounds.kill_path: manual foreground process termination by supervising coordinator
operational_bounds.notes: This draft does not authorize live execution. Token estimates are optional operational notes, not an architecture gate.

hard_stop: run leaves approved cwd or output roots
unexpected secret or private data exposure
automatic retry requested without explicit approval
required transcript or run-bundle path unavailable
soft_stop: branch evidence is too thin for score claims
reviewer requests more re-entry rounds than this receipt allows

scoring.retry_policy: no retries in smoke unless separately approved
scoring.variance_policy: unavailable until scorer bridge is approved

allowed_claims_if_success: A dry-run live adapter launch plan was rendered from a provider-off DR mesh bundle and execution-closed receipt.
Future execution remains routed through the Codex-DR live adapter path, not ad hoc codex exec.
